title: citharexylum quitense
intro: Citharexylum quitense, also known as Ecuadorian tree daphne, is a plant species native to the Andes mountains in Ecuador. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Citharexylum quitense include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
